findings.description: The knowledge file omits four setters from the W11AC01SearchForm code: setKanjiName (@Length(max=50), @SystemChar(charsetDef="zenkakuCharset")), setKanaName (@Length(max=50), @SystemChar(charsetDef="zenkakuKatakanaCharset")), setUgroupId (@Length(min=10, max=10), @SystemChar(charsetDef="numericCharset")), and setSortId (@PropertyName("ソートID"), @Required). These setters demonstrate three charsetDef values not shown elsewhere in the knowledge file (zenkakuCharset, zenkakuKatakanaCharset, numericCharset) and the exact-length pattern @Length(min=10, max=10).
findings.source_evidence: Source contains full setter implementations: setKanjiName with @SystemChar(charsetDef="zenkakuCharset"), setKanaName with @SystemChar(charsetDef="zenkakuKatakanaCharset"), setUgroupId with @Length(min = 10, max = 10) @SystemChar(charsetDef="numericCharset"), setSortId with @PropertyName("ソートID") @Required

findings.description: SystemAccountEntity is a PascalCase class name used directly in the W11AC01SearchForm code (as field type and setter parameter), but is absent from s1's hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `private SystemAccountEntity systemAccount;` and `public void setSystemAccount(SystemAccountEntity systemAccount)` with @ValidationTarget
